# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImageProcessingController < ApplicationController
  skip_before_action :verify_authenticity_token

  def convert_image
    uploaded_file = params[:image]
    format = params[:format]
    size = params[:size]

    if uploaded_file.nil?
      render json: { error: 'No image uploaded' }, status: :bad_request
      return
    end

    input_path = Rails.root.join('tmp', 'uploads', "input_#{Time.now.to_i}_#{uploaded_file.original_filename}")
    output_filename = "output_#{Time.now.to_i}.#{format}"
    output_path = Rails.root.join('tmp', 'uploads', output_filename)

    FileUtils.mkdir_p(File.dirname(input_path))

    File.open(input_path, 'wb') do |file|
      file.write(uploaded_file.read)
    end

    resize_option = size.present? ? "-resize #{size}" : ""
    command = "convert #{input_path} #{resize_option} #{output_path}"
    
    result = system(command)

    if result && File.exist?(output_path)
      send_file output_path, filename: output_filename, disposition: 'attachment'
      
      Thread.new do
        sleep 5
        File.delete(input_path) if File.exist?(input_path)
        File.delete(output_path) if File.exist?(output_path)
      end
    else
      render json: { error: 'Image conversion failed' }, status: :unprocessable_entity
      File.delete(input_path) if File.exist?(input_path)
    end
  end

  def convert_image_backticks
    uploaded_file = params[:image]
    format = params[:format]
    size = params[:size]

    if uploaded_file.nil?
      render json: { error: 'No image uploaded' }, status: :bad_request
      return
    end

    input_path = Rails.root.join('tmp', 'uploads', "input_#{Time.now.to_i}_#{uploaded_file.original_filename}")
    output_filename = "output_#{Time.now.to_i}.#{format}"
    output_path = Rails.root.join('tmp', 'uploads', output_filename)

    FileUtils.mkdir_p(File.dirname(input_path))

    File.open(input_path, 'wb') do |file|
      file.write(uploaded_file.read)
    end

    resize_option = size.present? ? "-resize #{size}" : ""
    output = `convert #{input_path} #{resize_option} #{output_path} 2>&1`

    if $?.success? && File.exist?(output_path)
      send_file output_path, filename: output_filename, disposition: 'attachment'
      
      Thread.new do
        sleep 5
        File.delete(input_path) if File.exist?(input_path)
        File.delete(output_path) if File.exist?(output_path)
      end
    else
      render json: { error: 'Image conversion failed', details: output }, status: :unprocessable_entity
      File.delete(input_path) if File.exist?(input_path)
    end
  end

  def batch_convert
    uploaded_files = params[:images]
    format = params[:format]
    size = params[:size]

    if uploaded_files.nil? || uploaded_files.empty?
      render json: { error: 'No images uploaded' }, status: :bad_request
      return
    end

    results = []
    uploaded_files.each do |uploaded_file|
      input_path = Rails.root.join('tmp', 'uploads', "input_#{Time.now.to_i}_#{rand(1000)}_#{uploaded_file.original_filename}")
      output_filename = "output_#{Time.now.to_i}_#{rand(1000)}.#{format}"
      output_path = Rails.root.join('tmp', 'uploads', output_filename)

      FileUtils.mkdir_p(File.dirname(input_path))

      File.open(input_path, 'wb') do |file|
        file.write(uploaded_file.read)
      end

      resize_option = size.present? ? "-resize #{size}" : ""
      command = "convert #{input_path} #{resize_option} #{output_path}"
      
      if system(command) && File.exist?(output_path)
        results << { filename: output_filename, status: 'success' }
      else
        results << { filename: uploaded_file.original_filename, status: 'failed' }
      end

      File.delete(input_path) if File.exist?(input_path)
    end

    render json: { results: results }
  end
end
